name: Miyuki
overview: Wakamatsu Masato lives with his step-sister (not blood-related), Miyuki. Their father is always working overseas,  leaving them to live by themselves in Toukyou. Miyuki is cute, nice, sensitive and very popular among Masato's friends and peers. Masato has a girlfriend at school whose name is Kajima Miyuki, who is pretty and gentle, the ideal dream of every highschool boy.
